project: Reanimated book - digitized library treasures for the creative industries
title: Orbis pictus - oziveni knihy pro kulturni a kreativni odvetvi

metadata.program: NAKI III – program na podporu aplikovaneho vyzkumu v oblasti narodni a kulturni identity na leta 2023 az 2030

english_title.label: English title
english_title.text: Reanimated book - digitized library treasures for the creative industries

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: digital libraries, image manipulation, machine learning

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: Czech libraries have an extensive corpus of digitized documents, representing a significant part of our cultural heritage. The aim of the presented project is to open up this wealth for its easier reuse by the creative industry.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Hradis Michal, Ing., Ph.D. (DCGM) – research leader Benes Karel, Ing., Ph.D. (FIT) Cejka Rudolf, Ing. (CVT) Herout Adam, prof. Ing., Ph.D. (DCGM) Kavalova Radka, Mgr. (RCIT) Kiss Martin, Ing. (DCGM) Kostelnik Martin, Ing. (DCGM) Vasko Marek, Ing. (DCGM)
